in order Plavanga, Kjlaka, Saumya, Sadharana and Rodhakjt. The two
years, Ktlaka and Saumya, are auspicious and beneficial, while
Plavahga is troublesome to the people in many ways. In the year
Sadh&rana there will be scanty rains and the sixfold troubles will
be on the increase. In the fifth year of Rodhakrt rainfall will be
sporadic but the crops will flourish.
[The traditional name for Rodhakrt is Virodhikrt.']

Jupiter's Course VIII 95
In the tenth lustrum belonging to Indragm the years are
named Paridhavin, Pramudin Anatida, Raksasa and Anala. In the
y
year PanWASym the central country will be destroyed, a king will
meet with his end, rain will be scanty and disastrous fires will
break out. In Pramadin the people will generally be indolent, war
will break out and trees which bear red flowers and whose seeds
are red will perish. The next year i.e. Ananda, will make every
body happy and prosperous.
